backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the DealDrop backend with CRUD operations for listings and orders, admin PIN-gated mutations, and query functions to retrieve listings/orders.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the frontend visual aesthetic revamp feature, listing all affected files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Deals & Resell Hub' that mounts the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with public layout routes for home/listing detail and standalone admin routes, wrapped in AdminAuthProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AddListingForm.t: Admin form component for creating new listings with validation, conditional expiry fields for flash/quick sale categories, and BigInt timestamp conversion on submit.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Horizontally scrollable pill-button filter bar for listing categories with icon labels and active/inactive inline styles using OKLCH colors.
frontend/src/components/CountdownTimer.t: Countdown timer component that converts a nanosecond BigInt expiry timestamp to a live HH:MM:SS display, supporting compact and full unit-labeled layouts.
A form component for editing or deleting an existing listing, with fields for title, description, prices, category, image URL, stock, and optional expiry for timed sales. Uses update/delete mutation hooks and admin PIN authentication.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header (logo + nav), main content slot, and footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: A customer-facing order form that collects name, phone, address, and quantity, validates input, submits via the placeOrder mutation, and shows a success confirmation with order details.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a listing as a card with image, category badge, discount percentage, countdown timer for timed sales, and expired/out-of-stock overlays, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/contexts/AdminAuthContext.t: React context that stores admin authentication state (PIN and isAuthenticated flag) and exposes login/logout callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an anonymous or identity-authenticated config, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and expose identity and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for listings and orders CRUD operations (fetch, create, update, delete, toggle) that call the backend actor and invalidate relevant caches on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the dark theme color palette, and utility component classes for cards, badges, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page displaying navigation cards to the Listings and Orders management sections, with a logout button that clears admin auth and redirects to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with a PIN input form that validates credentials against the backend via getAllOrders, stores the PIN in admin auth context, and navigates to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public home page that displays active listings with category filtering, computes stats (total deals, average discount, flash sales count), and renders a hero section with product cards and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/ListingDetailPage.tsx: Displays full details for a single listing including image, pricing, discount, category badge, countdown timer for timed sales, and an order form. Handles loading skeletons and error/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ListingsManagementPag: Admin page for managing all listings, allowing the owner to add, edit, and toggle active status of listings via dialogs and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersDashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard page that displays all orders sorted by timestamp with status summary counts and allows the owner to update individual order statuses.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color palette, border radii, glow box shadows, and keyframe animations for the deals platform UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for this single-owner deals and reselling website.
